analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces a message from President Vladimir Putin to Sri Lankan President Gotabaya Rajapaksa and tags related accounts/media. It contains no content of the message, no evaluative language, and no framing. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention of the West or moral judgments. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): Not present; no reference to multipolarity, sovereignty, BRICS, or non-Western cooperation beyond a neutral bilateral mention without framing. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): While a bilateral presidential message could imply diplomacy, the tweet gives no claims of peace, solidarity, aid, mediation, or reliability; thus insufficient to classify under RU3. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the forefront): No claims of success or leadership. RU6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not referenced. Conclusion: The tweet promotes none of the listed narratives.
